prestazioni: Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger upgrade for the **Kavachi 18K4G** 1.8L turbocharged engine (engine code: *18K4G*), supporting up to 300whp with a 22psi boost threshold and integrated 3-bar MAP sensor calibration via a Haltech Elite 1500 ECU

Custom 3-inch stainless steel turbo-back exhaust system by **Milltek Sport** with 200-cell catalytic converter and resonated center section, paired with a **Tial 44mm external wastegate** for precise boost control on the *18K4G* platform

Full **Mahle Motorsport** forged piston and connecting rod kit (86.5mm bore, 8.5:1 compression ratio) with **ARP 2000** head studs, **Ferrea Racing** intake/exhaust valves (1mm oversized), and **Supertech** valve springs/retainers for 8,500 RPM reliability
estetica: Full **Rocket Bunny V2** widebody conversion kit for the Roewe 550 (2012-2017 facelift), including carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and a 3-piece rear diffuser with integrated **Aeromotions** active rear wing (adjustable via electronic actuators)

**VMR V710** 19x9.5 ET35 forged wheels in matte bronze, wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2** 255/35 R19 tires, paired with **KW Clubsport 3-way coilovers** (24-level damping adjustment) and **H&R** 25mm front / 20mm rear anti-roll bars

**Seibon Carbon** hood with integrated NACA ducts for *18K4G* intercooler cooling, paired with a **Mishimoto** aluminum radiator and dual **SPAL 12-inch puller fans** for thermal management under sustained boost
